errors.meaning: The daily-brief job ran successfully but failed to post to Slack because the delivery channel is configured as 'slack:c0amse2tw2x' — an invalid format. The channel ID needs to be bare (no 'slack:' prefix).
errors.suggestedFix: Update the daily-brief cron job delivery channel from 'slack:c0amse2tw2x' to 'C0AMSE2TW2X' (bare channel ID, no prefix).
